releaseNotes:
- Force/normal modes with side-by-side action buttons and download progress
 - app.config.js: dynamic runtimeVersion, expo-router plugin, drop unused storage permissions
 - Install expo-application, align expo SDK to 54.0.35 patches

Profile screen:
 - Reorder sections: driver info up, theme/version/logout to bottom
 - New DriverInfoCard with left accent bars (phone/license/expiry)
 - Compact tinted MiniStat cards (success/info/warning)
 - Show scroll indicator, conditional STAGING badge, type/dead-code fixes

Shipment navigation:
 - Add shipments stack with slide_from_right animation and swipe-back
 - Remove non-functional Copy button on order count
